chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-262 of 2020 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag-A. 2. For orders on CMA No.1305/2020 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 30.09.2025 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioners under instructions does not press the instant petition and submits that petitioner intends to approach before Service Tribunal. Accordingly, instant petition is hereby dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
